reviews.review_description: For a small dungeon run to find all the books and find weapons and fight its really well done. Its a few hours of fun for sure and worth checking out!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review! It's always great to hear that people are enjoying my game.  If you have any feedback or requests for improvement, please let me know.

reviews.review_description: It's a bit boring not being able to skip dialogue, but other than that it's a great proof of concept. It'd be cool to see where this game goes, you don't see RPG games on vr that often and I think this was pretty fun. I hope to see a story in future iterations.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great review! Glad to hear that you thought it was fun. I'm planning to add a skip button for the dialogue after the initial viewing of it since it sets the stage for the game & an expanded story is coming as well.  Please keep the good feedback coming - it's what I need to make it better :)

reviews.review_description: This game is a lot of fun.  It's easy to get a hang of and there are lots of different weapons to find. The world is very immersive and always keeps my attention.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the awesome review!  I'm very glad that you're enjoying the game.  Please feel free to reach out anytime to provide feedback - good, bad, or other.  Thanks!

reviews.review_description: I like the atmosphere, I'd make it way darker so that the torch is actually useful. Right now it's in early stages but with some physics based combat it will be great!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the positive & useful feedback!  Physics-based combat is on my list of things to add moving forward.

reviews.review_description: Watch your back!  This game unlocks a fully immersive VR world cloaked in fog and mystery with violent creatures guarding golden treasure!  Pull the trigger to light your torch and proceed with caution!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great comments!  Much appreciated and be sure to try the latest version when you have a chance.

reviews.review_description: I do not know if it is me that is just stupid, but have been all over the map at-lest 2 times but can’t find the blue book. I have tried to open every door I was able to find but there was nothing there?

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review.  The blue book is a bit more hidden than the others.  Spoiler alert: If you watch this video to about the 7 min mark, you'll see where it is https://youtu.be/uJGbC-MUyZw.  If this was the only issue for you & you actually liked the game, I would be most appreciative if you could please increase the number of stars that you gave in your review - thanks.  The game is work in progress, so any other feedback that you may have would be super helpful for future iterations - thanks in advance!

reviews.review_title: Great Game But Needs Work And Is Buggy
reviews.review_description: I was playing this game for a while and it was fun up until my weapons dissapeared i dropped my sword to interact with something and it vanished then my wand disappeared while i was climbing it was nowhere in the room i was in and i ended up having to surrender to the enemies because i wasnt able to kill them. This happened multiple different times. Please fix this. Other than than i had an overall enjoyable experience and would love to see more content.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words about the game and we're sorry that you experienced a problem.  If you can please send an email to support@hiddenrealmsvr.com with more detail on exactly where your sword and wand disappeared - a screenshot would be super helpful - and any other pertinent details to help us replicate the problem - that would be most appreciated.  Once replicated, we can begin to work on a fix for it.  Thanks so much in advance for your help!

reviews.review_title: Good atmosphere, but not a game yet
reviews.review_description: It's easy to see the potential, as a lot of work has gone into the world, but the mechanics are very early in development. One if the first mechanics you're introduced to is breaking vases to find a key, but nothing outside that first room is breakable, including other vases. Additionally, it's not obvious to take the key back from the door. It will open nearly ever lock you'll come across, but there's no rewards you can claim beyond the experience of accessing a few cool rooms. All enemies you'll encounter die within a couple seconds of wiggling whatever weapon(s) you have inside them and they'll ragdoll in a means similar to a deflating balloon with an overly long sounds FX to help support that notion. Be careful not to fall off the map, as there's no death barrier and you'll have to quit and restart the game. There's no jumping beyond clipping into a chest and being launched sky-high. Once you locate the library and realize you can climb the ladders by dropping what's in your hands, you can get up to an area with a spinning, glowing red book, but you can't interact with it. That's the end of the current experience, which is about a half-hours worth.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great feedback.  I'm a lone Indie developer and have been working to address these feedback items and more with every new release.  Please be sure to try out the latest version when you have a chance.

Thank you for your feedback about the game and we're sorry that you experienced a problem.  If you can please send an email to support@hiddenrealmsvr.com with more detail on bug(s) you experienced - a screenshot would be super helpful - and any other pertinent details to help us replicate the problem - that would be most appreciated.  Once replicated, we can begin to work on a fix for it.  Thanks so much in advance for your help!

reviews.review_description: I hope there will be an update soon to fix the mechanics & overall playability within the game. It has a lot of potential.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your good feedback.   I'm a lone Indie developer and have been working to address these feedback items and more with every new release.  Please be sure to try out the latest version when you have a chance.

reviews.review_description: Please change having to hold the stick clicked in to run, this will surely be terrible for the controller. Due to this only lasted plastic for about 4 minutes. Would live to complete.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback.  I haven't run into any controller issues yet with clicking the stick to run, but I'll definitely give some thought on how to do it differently moving forward.  Please be sure to try out the latest version when you have a chance.

reviews.review_description: I can just swing my arm left and right not physics the climbing is trash dont get this

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback.  I've recently introduced active-ragdoll tech into the game, which makes it feel more like Gorn when you hit enemies.  While I like the concept of full physics based games, I found that many are still rather awkward to play with your sword often getting stuck on something.  So, I've opted for a partial physics based game instead which I think feels more natural (to me at least.) Please be sure to try out the latest version when you have a chance and let me know what you think - thanks!

reviews.review_description:
The positive:
Remind me of Ancient Dungeon VR, but it is much better.

The negative:
A bit of motion sickness
Not sure why my weapon keeps falling out of my hand.
I got stuck at one point in the wall
Why do I have to hold the key in one hand at the beginning? This made me drop the wand behind the wall and it took a while to get it back.
Not sure how to open the chest and what money is for.

developer_response.body:
Awesome feedback! Ancient Dungeon is a great VR game, so I'm very pleased to hear of your positive comparison.  To answer your questions: 
1) The grip button is pressed once to hold a weapon / item and then once again to drop the weapon / item. 
2) The game is far from perfect at this early access stage of development. 
3) You can put the key / weapons in your holster (green circles on right and left side of you.) 
4) Use the key to open chests and other doors.  Money is currently for fun, but I would like to allow it to be spent on items in a future version of the game.

I'd love to hear more feedback if you have it - helps me improve the game :)

reviews.review_description: Overall, much potential for development. Biggest disappointment - I found a red book but couldn't pick it up or interact in any way. Was that the end? Lot's of opportunity for hiding keys to get into the various rooms, but with the layout so confusing they better be near-by. Also see potential for various puzzles with the electrical devices but don't see the need for much solving if the keys and navigating are the primary obstacles. Climbing the ladders is good, but would also like to be able to move sideways at the top on the rails in order to reach a goal.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great feedback Scott!  I'm a lone Indie developer and have been working to address these feedback items and more with every new release.  Please be sure to try out the latest version when you have a chance and let me know your thoughts - thanks!

reviews.review_description: So who wouldn't want to be reincarnated, to then go beat the everloving crap out of a bunch of horrid monsters?!? That's exactly what everyone wishes for! I know I do at least. Lots of potential in this title, keep up the good work Mr. Developer sir!

developer_response.body: Awesome - thanks for the great review comments!  Please be sure to try the latest version when you have a chance.
